author: lOrm
content: Fixed in src/state/categories.rs: SessionId::from_raw now validates input as UUID via uuid::Uuid::parse and returns Result<Self, uuid::Error>. Added from_raw_unchecked for legacy test-fixture path with explicit unsafe-by-contract doc. New session_id_from_raw_validates_uuid test asserts UUID round-trip works and that empty / abcd-1234 / ../../etc/passwd / not-a-uuid / malformed UUIDs all fail. Existing round-trip test renamed to session_id_round_trips_from_raw_unchecked.
